item.title: KV 缓存的自适应过滤：诊断和纠正 LLM 推理中的结构角色偏差
item.summary: arXiv:2607.13205v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Attention-based KV cache eviction (H2O and its descendants) compresses the memory-constrained state of a long-context model by ranking tokens on accumulated attention mass, treated here as signal energy, and keeping the heaviest.
